experience.title: Freelance Product Development Manager
bullets: Managed teams and major product lines

skills_and_achievements: Expert in apparel, packaging, graphics, fabric sourcing, knitwear, cost structuring, CAD (Ned Graphics, Kaledo, U4ia), Adobe CC, and PDM/PLM. Strong in trend boards, fit, production specs, and negotiation; managed teams and major product lines; grew a children’s line to $10M, saved $30K on prints, and trained 20+ freelancers.
